SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.api

Interface IScanListener

public interface IScanListener
Callback-based listener for scan events. All methods have default no-op implementations.
Author:
Milton Smith

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    onHostCompleted(IScanResult result, int completedCount, int total)
    A host scan completed (success or failure).
    default void
    onHostStarted(URL url, int index, int total)
    A host scan is starting.
    default void
    onHostStatus(URL url, String message)
    Status text from the scanning engine for a host (bridges BackgroundTask).
    default void
    onScanCompleted(List<IScanResult> results)
    All hosts scanned.
    default void
    onSectionCompleted(URL url, ScanSection section)
    A section completed on a host.
    default void
    onSectionStarted(URL url, ScanSection section)
    A section is starting on a host.

  • Method Details

    • onHostStarted

      default void onHostStarted(URL url, int index, int total)
